prevalence.source: WHO/PAHO viral gastroenteritis context; surveillance data
prevalence.trend: stable; rotavirus vaccination reduces infant burden

burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate in children; low mortality overall
burden.mortalityRate: Low; higher in infants and vulnerable adults

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical diagnosis; stool testing rarely needed outside outbreaks

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with ORS and supportive care

regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: ORS, zinc in children, IV fluids for severe cases
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Outbreak control in schools and institutions
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Rotavirus vaccine coverage and ORS availability
